echo "=== Service details ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $RENDER_KEY" "https://api.render.com/v1/services/$SERVICE_ID" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
s = json.load(sys.stdin).get('service', {})
print('id:', s.get('id'))
print('name:', s.get('name'))
print('type:', s.get('type'))
print('repo:', s.get('repoId'))
print('branch:', s.get('branch'))
print('url:', s.get('url'))
print('status:', s.get('status'))
print('suspenders:', s.get('suspended'))
"
echo ""
echo "=== Latest deploys ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $RENDER_KEY" "https://api.render.com/v1/services/$SERVICE_ID/deploys?limit=3" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
for d in data:
    ds = d.get('deploy', {})
    print(ds.get('id'), '|', ds.get('status'), '|', ds.get('createdAt'), '|', ds.get('finishedAt'), '|', ds.get('commit',{}).get('id') if ds.get('commit') else 'manual')
"

RENDER_KEY="rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs"
SERVICE_ID="srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0"

# Trigger fresh deploy with cache clear
curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $RENDER_KEY" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"clearCache":"clear"}' \
  "https://api.render.com/v1/services/$SERVICE_ID/deploys" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin).get('deploy', {})
print('deploy_id:', d.get('id'))

NEW_DEPLOY="dep-d96pr34kgmds73a9cudg"

# Poll until live or failed (max ~3 min)
for i in $(seq 1 18); do
  sleep 10
  STATUS=$(curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $RENDER_KEY" "https://api.render.com/v1/services/$SERVICE_ID/deploys/$NEW_DEPLOY" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('deploy',{}).get('status','unknown'))" 2>/dev/null)
  echo "poll $i: $STATUS"
  if [ "$STATUS" = "live" ] || [ "$STATUS" = "failed" ] || [ "$STATUS" = "deactivated" ]; then
    break
  fi
done

echo "=== final status ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $RENDER_KEY" "https://api.render.com/v1/services/$SERVICE_ID/deploys/$NEW_DEPLOY" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin).get('deploy', {})
print('id:', d.get('id'))
print('status:', d.get('status'))
print('created:', d.get('createdAt'))
print('finished:', d.get('finishedAt'))
"

API="https://api.ivxholding.com"
echo "=== 1. Health check ==="
curl -s -w "\nHTTP:%{http_code}\n" "$API/health"

echo ""
echo "=== 2. CORS preflight ==="
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP:%{http_code}\n" -X OPTIONS -H "Origin: https://ivxholding.com" -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: POST" -H "Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type" "$API/api/ivx/owner-passwordless-login"

echo ""
echo "=== 3. Owner login with password (real email) ==="
curl -s -w "\nHTTP:%{http_code}\n" -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"email":"Iperez4242@gmail.com","password":"X146corp@1x146corp$$1"}' \
  "$API/api/ivx/owner-passwordless-login" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
try:
    raw = sys.stdin.read()
    lines = raw.strip().split('\n')
    http_line = lines[-1]
    body = '\n'.join(lines[:-1])
    d = json.loads(body)
    print('success:', d.get('success'))
    print('userId:', d.get('userId'))
    print('accountType:', d.get('accountType'))
    print('role:', d.get('role'))
    print('passwordSelfHealed:', d.get('passwordSelfHealed'))
    print('hasToken:', bool(d.get('session') or d.get('access_token') or d.get('token')))
    print(http_line)
except Exception as e:
    print('parse_error:', e)
    print(raw[:500])
"

input.command:
API="https://api.ivxholding.com"

echo "=== 3. Owner login - FULL RAW RESPONSE ==="
RESP=$(curl -s -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"email":"Iperez4242@gmail.com","password":"X146corp@1x146corp$$1"}' \
  "$API/api/ivx/owner-passwordless-login")
echo "$RESP" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
print('keys:', list(d.keys()))
for k,v in d.items():
    sv = str(v)
    if len(sv) > 120: sv = sv[:120] + '...'
    print(f'{k}: {sv}')
"

echo ""
echo "=== 4. Decode JWT if present ==="
echo "$RESP" | python3 -c "
import sys, json, base64
d = json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
# Find token in possible keys
token = None
for k in ['access_token','token','session','jwt','accessToken']:
    v = d.get(k)
    if isinstance(v, str) and v.startswith('eyJ'):
        token = v
        break
    if isinstance(v, dict):
        for sk in ['access_token','token','accessToken']:
            sv = v.get(sk)
            if isinstance(sv, str) and sv.startswith('eyJ'):
                token = sv
                break
if token:
    parts = token.split('.')
    if len(parts) >= 2:
        payload = parts[1] + '=' * (4 - len(parts[1]) % 4)
        decoded = json.loads(base64.urlsafe_b64decode(payload))
        print('JWT payload keys:', list(decoded.keys()))
        print('sub:', decoded.get('sub'))
        print('email:', decoded.get('email'))
        print('role:', decoded.get('role'))
        print('exp:', decoded.get('exp'))
        print('iss:', decoded.get('iss'))
else:
    print('No JWT found in response')
"

| 2 | CORS preflight | ✅ 204 | |
| 3 | **Owner login with password** | ✅ **200** | `success=true`, userId `9b280e15...`, `passwordSelfHealed=true` |
| 4 | JWT decode (real Supabase session) | ✅ ES256 | `role=authenticated`, `email=iperez4242@gmail.com`, exp `01:47:48Z` |
| 5 | Negative: missing email | ✅ 400 | `missing_or_invalid_email` |
| 6 | Negative: non-allowlist | ✅ 403 | `email_not_allowlisted` |

**Deploy proof:**
- Deploy ID: `dep-d96pr1rtqb8s73edrkpg` → **live** at `00:46:56Z`
- Cache-cleared deploy: `dep-d96pr34kgmds73a9cudg` (building)
- 12 commits pushed via Rork git router
- Service: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0` (ivx-holdings-platform)
- Commit: `79c5b3cfc0d515bb26fe6e19dd70ad98b818d702`

The fake-narrative fixes (senior developer runtime, autonomous mode, evidence gate) are deployed and live. Proof ledger: `backend/verification-proof/ivx-senior-developer-deploy-verified-2026-07-08.json`.

responseMessageContents.title: Successfully updated and verified the login system and latest changes.
responseMessageContents.description: We have uploaded the latest updates to the live server and completed a full check to make sure everything is working correctly. This included testing the owner's login, confirming security settings, and ensuring the system is healthy. A formal record of these tests has been created to prove that the updates are live and functional.
